fields.Background\n: Background: Stewie Griffin is the third child and second son of Peter Griffin, The youngest brother of Meg Griffin, Chris Griffin an the older half brother of Berthald. From birth he was a genius. He bagan as a megalomical sociopath, initially obsessed with violence, matrice and world domination
fields.Strengths\n: Child genius capeble of creating time machines and sci-fi like technology. He knows martial arts and is emotionless
fields.Weaknesses\n: Is a baby easy to stop, prone to distractions, poor choises, limited by his size
